subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of God's love! On the Day of His Manifestation thou didst witness the radiance of the Mount and beheld the Tree of Túbá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله در یوم ظهور تجلی مجلی طور مشاهده نمودی و از شجره طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
